_note: v0.3 Item 2: `satisfies InstanceType<typeof __svn_C_xx>['$$prop_def']` trailer on the component-call props literal makes tsgo catch missing required props. The TokenMapEntry pass in emit_document maps the satisfies span back to the `<Comp` opening tag, so the TS2741 surfaces at the user-visible call site instead of being dropped by the synthesized-region source-map filter.
